'''Barada Rakul''' was captain of the ''[[Moulee-rah Patogga]]'', a smuggling vessel working with the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidics]]. It was originally owned by [[Aruk Besadii Aora]], but later sold to [[Jiliac Desilijic Tiron]].

Just prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the vessel was seized after it was discovered that it was hauling over one hundred metric tons of [[Ryll/Legends|ryll]].
